scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:sync:home: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/prepare-android-variant.ps1 -Variant home && npm run build:home && cap sync android
scripts.android:sync:hu-chi-tieu: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/prepare-android-variant.ps1 -Variant hu-chi-tieu && npm run build:hu-chi-tieu && cap sync android
scripts.android:apk:home: npm run android:sync:home && cd android && java -jar gradle\wrapper\gradle-wrapper.jar assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:hu-chi-tieu: npm run android:sync:hu-chi-tieu && cd android && java -jar gradle\wrapper\gradle-wrapper.jar assembleDebug
